question: What year was the actor son of Jeremiah Porter born? Write your answer as [ANSWER].

1.fact: Jeremiah Porter: Porter was born in manhattan. In 2015 Porter was adopted by Glenn Cook, the father of Ben Cook (actor) and attended the Metropolitan School of the Arts.
1.subquestion: Who is the actor son of Glenn Cook connected to Jeremiah Porter?

2.fact: Ben Cook (actor): Benjamin Tyler Cook (born December 11, 1997) is an American actor, dancer and singer.
2.subquestion: What year was Ben Cook born?
